body_preview: - Trajectory graph pressure row 4: `failed_tool_summary.bash_tool_error=14` — bash commands are the dominant tool-failure category across recent sessions. The RecoveryHintTool in tool_wrappers.rs already provides targeted recovery hints for bash failures (exit codes, timeouts, spawn failures), but the timeout path in StreamingBashTool::invoke (src/tools.rs:6
expected_evidence: Future trajectory snapshots show reduced `bash_tool_error` count in `failed_tool_summary`. State events show `stash_diagnostic_error` with "bash timeout (retrying)" pattern when retry is attempted. Implementation Notes: Use `tokio::time::timeout()` instead of `tokio::time::sleep()` in the select so timeout extension is cleaner. The current code uses: ```rust
title: Add single-retry for timed-out bash commands in StreamingBashTool
